response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals with 14+ years across multiple platforms and required languages, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure. However, this Principal role is domain-specific, requiring deep expertise in experimentation frameworks, metrics/telemetry systems, feature flagging, and measurement platforms—entirely absent from the resume. A 6-month tenure at re:cinq and current 5-month career gap raise concerns about domain alignment. While capable of learning, Principal roles require immediate impact in the core domain, making this a poor fit without demonstrated experimentation platform experience.
strengths: Extensive technical breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems with proficiency in required languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, C#, Java, Python ecosystem)
Proven ability to work at enterprise scale: managed millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby with real-time microservices, low-latency systems, and performance databases
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, FOSS4G talks, and open-source projects (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective) demonstrating cross-team influence
concerns: Zero documented experience building experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, A/B testing frameworks, or rollout-management systems—the core technical domain of this role
No evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure work, statistical analysis, experimental design, or bias detection methodologies required for growth systems at this level
Recent career instability with only 6 months tenure at re:cinq (most recent role) and 5-month career gap, signaling potential domain or role-fit concerns

key_factors.factor: Recent Job Instability and Career Gap
Strong Engineering Fundamentals and Language Coverage
